character_designs.name_cn: 肃明基层虫吏多状态角色板
character_designs.character: Suming Lower Insect Official and White-Register Clerk
character_designs.identity: Lower-tier Suming insect bureaucrats, white-register clerks, and granary-tax petty officials who order registration, grain levy, village sealing, wax stamping, scent marking, and slave-soldier deployment

body_and_face.species_lock: Low-ranking insect bureaucrat with near-upright official silhouette; never a human scholar, human magistrate, masked man, Bai Yi duplicate, or combat infantry.
body_and_face.scale: Approximately 1.8 to 2.1 meters tall in-world, lower and less elegant than Bai Yi, more upright and bureaucratic than insect infantry.
body_and_face.build: Near-upright but slightly forward-leaning shoulders, stiff office posture, narrow chest under short official robe, no reverse-jointed pursuit stance.
body_and_face.face: Dark brown or obsidian compound eyes with no sclera, iris, or ordinary human pupil; bone-white cheek shells or small jaw plates; dark-green neck membrane visible above the hard collar.
body_and_face.head_hair: No full human hair, topknot, sideburns, beard, or cloth headwrap. A low insect-wax cap, half-round clerk hat, or bone-white short cap covers the top; a single thin rear money-tail insect-whisker queue or two to three trimmed short antenna bundles exit from under the back edge.
body_and_face.hands: Elongated segmented fingers with small chitin plates, used for pressing register pages, wax stamping, scent tags, and abacus beads.

constant_anchors: low insect-wax official cap or half-round clerk hat
rear money-tail insect-whisker queue or trimmed short antenna bundles
dark compound eyes with no human eye details
dark green-black inner layer at collar, cuffs, and side slits
old iron ledger belt and account tags
tiny locked black-sun or white-wing-over-black-sun physical tag
white-register board with no readable text
bone abacus or grain-tax tally object

state_designs.episode_range: village sealing, purge-team arrival, outer-office order scenes
state_designs.silhouette: Short stiff official robe, low cylindrical insect-wax cap, one hand holding a wax order slip or sealing mallet, the other hand gesturing slave soldiers forward.
state_designs.color_logic: Wax grey-white and bone white dominate with dark green-black inner pressure and old iron low-rank authority.
state_designs.damage_level: Clean but not dustless; cuffs show wax cracks and travel grit, unlike Bai Yi's impossible cleanliness.
required_details: rear insect-whisker queue must be visible from the cap edge
compound eyes and cheek shells must prevent human-official reading
short robe must not become Bai Yi's long robe
gesture must read as ordering others, not doing combat

state_designs.episode_range: Qingming white-register, checkpoint, child-identifier, and old-name suspect scenes
state_designs.silhouette: Narrower clerk robe, half-round ledger hat, register board against chest, segmented fingers pressing the blank page and wax seal.
state_designs.color_logic: Pearl grey and bone white make the clerk bureaucratic, while dark compound eyes, green-black neck membrane, and old iron tags keep insect identity visible.
state_designs.damage_level: Orderly, lightly wax-smeared, no blood or ragged cloth.
required_details: no readable writing on the register
two or three trimmed antenna bundles may replace the single rear queue
hands must look segmented while performing clerical work
must not look like a human scholar or scribe

state_designs.episode_range: Jinhe granary, mill district, convoy levy, border granary gate scenes
state_designs.silhouette: Wax-grey-blue field clerk robe with side-slit mobility, ledger belt crowded with grain tags, bone abacus, old iron scale hook, and wax-seal pouch.
state_designs.color_logic: Granary state lowers the white into wax-grey-blue and old iron while keeping bone-white cuffs and dark-green insect undertone.
state_designs.damage_level: Work-scuffed but institutional; flour dust, wax smears, and iron scratches only.
required_details: grain and tax function must read through tally objects, abacus, and scale hook
still visibly insect through compound eyes, cheek shell, neck membrane, and rear queue
not a human accountant, not a merchant, not a granary worker

detail_panels.purpose: Lock the insect official hairstyle and head hierarchy.
detail_panels.notes: Low insect-wax cap, half-round clerk hat, or bone-white short cap with one rear money-tail insect-whisker queue or trimmed short antenna bundles. No human hair or topknot.
Dark compound eyes with no sclera or iris, bone-white cheek shell, dark-green neck membrane under hard collar.
Long segmented fingers pressing blank register page, wax seal, scent tag, or abacus bead.

detail_panels.purpose: Differentiate lower official from Bai Yi.
detail_panels.notes: Wax-grey-white knee-to-calf robe, dark green-black inner layer, bone-white sleeve binding, no long dustless robe.
White-register board, wax seal box, stylus needle, old iron ledger tag, scent tag, bone abacus, grain tally, scale hook.
Small copied black-sun or white-wing-over-black-sun physical tag on belt, seal, cap button, or register corner only.
Wax-grey-white, bone white, pearl grey, dark green-black, old iron, black sun black, cold-gold pin, insect-wax pale yellow.
